mapper.sql: c.cef_id, c.er_id, c.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, c.rprt_yr, c.cef_st_cd, c.ttl_redu_amt, c.sbmt_dt, c.aprv_dt, c.use_bgng_dt, c.use_end_dt, c.frst_reg_dt, c.frst_reg_user_id, c.last_chg_dt, c.last_chg_user_id
FROM er.tn_cef c JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = c.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN c.use_bgng_dt AND c.use_end_dt

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = c.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = c.rprt_yr AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(cef_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM er.tn_cef WHERE cef_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(cef_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_cef (cef_id, er_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, cef_st_cd, ttl_redu_amt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{cefId}, #{erId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, 'DRAFT', 0, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_cef SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND cef_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pure_fuel_mass), 0) FROM er.tn_cef_claim WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_cef SET cef_st_cd = 'SBMTD', sbmt_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND cef_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_cef SET cef_st_cd = 'APRVD', aprv_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND cef_st_cd = 'SBMTD' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
UPDATE er.tn_cef SET cef_st_cd = 'CNCLD', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cef_id = #{cefId} AND cef_st_cd = 'APRVD' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
